# Sweet & Lovely

> Freshly made pizza with fast delivery across our active South African delivery zones.

Sweet & Lovely is a pizza restaurant and delivery service. The site lets customers browse the full menu, see delivery zones and fees, find a nearby location, and contact the team.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, fan favorites, deals, desserts, locations and delivery FAQs.
- [Full Menu](/menu/full-menu): The complete menu — pizzas, sides, desserts and drinks with prices.
- [Locations & Delivery](/locations): Delivery zones, fees, estimated times and pickup info.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for questions, feedback or catering.
